productDisplayName: Nike Women's Double Team Lite Black Shoe
description: Stylish to the T and comfortable for the feet, the nike women's Double Team Lite shoe looks absolutely classy with the wrap around swoosh branding. Good for those casual walks, it makes for a perfect casual footwear.Upper Synthetic leather upper with toe box lining and heel cup overlays for durability and structure Wrap around swoosh branding on the sides with a patent trim on the tongue and branding on the heel cup Perforated toe box for ventilation and dry comfort Nylon, padded sockliner for dry in-step comfort Mildly padded tongue with synthetic twill lace-up system for snug Fit Midsole EVA midsole for durability and lightweight comfort Mildly padded sockliner for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole for durability Herringbone tread pattern for traction and grip Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
